steps.title: Count the number of doublings
steps.content: From 1653 to 1953 is $1953-1653=300$ years. With doubling every 75 years, the count is $\tfrac{300}{75}=4$ doublings.

steps.title: Solve for the initial population
steps.content: Let $P_0$ be the 1653 population. Then $P_0\cdot 2^4=288{,}000$. $$P_0=\frac{288{,}000}{16}=18{,}000.$$ The answer is 18000.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $18000$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $18000$ is the value to enter.
